title: Bridge Essay: Revisiting the mental imagery debate: New evidence from aphantasia and neuroimag

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal Reconstruction** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Mental imagery — visual imagery as real perception, imagination, pareidolia, aphantasia.

**Revisiting the mental imagery debate: New evidence from aphantasia and neuroimaging.**. Cortex.. PMID: 41066851. DOI: 10.1016/j.cortex.2025.09.011. In this viewpoint letter, Icritically examine the longstanding debate regarding the nature of mental imagery-specifically the tension between depictive and propositional theories-through the lens of recent neuroscientific findings. While early studies using neuroimaging were interpreted as supporting adepictive, perception-like model of visual imagery, emerging data from individuals with aphantasia present compelling counterevidence.
